action.reasoning: Observation: previous introspection confirmed pathfinder.find_path works and returns multi-point geodesic paths from Spot to the humanoid; direct compass pursuit is still the best evaluated checkpoint but cannot navigate around walls. Analysis: the next missing piece is transforming a navmesh waypoint into Spot's egocentric frame so a continuous velocity controller can follow planner waypoints. Decision: run a very small transform sanity script comparing sim_obj world-to-local coordinates against the built-in human gps/compass sensor, then use that mapping in predict.py.
